titleStmt.title: SII 17.328: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 328. (A.R. No. 299 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north, east and south bases of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This records that Vaippūr-uḍaiyāṉ Aḍiyaṉ Puyaṅgan, the kaṇkāṇi officer of Āṟṟūr-nāḍu and other divisions included in it, having enquired of the upāsakas of Āṟṟūr-nāḍu about their arrears in ghee and curd supplied to the temple of Tiruhkāḷattimahādēva, short of the stipulated amount as per terms of the endowment of 15 cows made by Śōḻā-vēḷān in the 16th regnal year of the king (1001 A.D.) and the total default in the supply of ghee and curd as per terms of another endowment of five cows, one each by Karuppāṟuḍaiyāṉ, his brother Paṇḍāri, his mother Poṟṟi, Toṇḍaimānār alias Kavira Piḍāraṉ and Vayiramēghaṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ, a merchant of Mummuḍiśōḻapuram, made in the 23rd regnal year of the king (1008 A.D.), they (the upāsakas) seem to have agreed to pay a cash compensation of 24 kaḻañju and 2 mā towards the unremitted quantities of 15 kalam of ghee and 44 kalam and 2 tūṉi of curd computed from the date of the respective endowments up to 161st day of the 27th year of the king's reign. The further details of the record are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Etadviśvanṛpaśraṇi maulimālopalāṅitam . śāsanandeva devasya rājakesarivarmaṇaḥ . tirumakaḷ pola perunilac celviyum taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kān=taḷūrcālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikai vaḻiyum kuṭamalai nāṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻi Ūḻiyuḷ Ellā viyāṇṭum toḻutu kai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarai tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarājakecari panmarāṉa śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup perumpāṇappāṭit tiruveṅkaṭa koṭṭattu Āṟṟūr ṉāṭṭu tirukkāḷatti mātevar Upāsakarai Iṉnāṭṭu Uḷḷiṭṭa nāṭukaḷ kaṅkāṇināyakam ceykiṉṟa vaippūr Uṭaiyāṉ Aṭiyaṉ puyaṅkar Ivvupāsakarai Aḻaittu niṅkaḷ tirukkāḷatti mātevaṟku nivan=tappaṭi ceyakkaṭava nivan=taṅkaḷ ceyyā toḻin=taṉa yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu mutal can=tirātittavaṟ tirukkāḷatti mātevarkku coḻaveḷāṉ vaitta pacu patiṉṉain=ti ṉālum nāṅkaḷ cantrātittavaṟ niccalpaṭi Aṭṭakkaṭavomā(ṉa)ṉa neyyuḻakkā
lum tayir nāṉāḻiyālum nāṅkaḷ yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu ḷ 100 6 10 1 varaiyilum Aṭṭi van=ta ney Uriyum tayir Irunāḻiyum nikki nāṅkaḷ Aṭṭātu niṉṟa ney Uḻak kum tayir nāḻiyālum tirukkāḷatti mātevaṟkku cantrātittavaṟ karuppāṟuṭaiyāṉ kuṭutta pacu Oṉṟum Ivan tampi paṇṭāri kuṭutta pacu Oṉṟum Ivaṉ tāyi poṟṟi kuṭutta pacu Oṉṟum toṇṭaimānāṟ Āṉa kavirapiṭāraṉ kuṭutta pacu Oṉṟum nakara mummuṭicoḻapurattu viyāpāri vayiramekaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ kuṭutta pacu Oṉṟum Āka pacu Añciṉāl yāṇṭu 2 10 3 tu mutal can=tirātittaval nāṅkaḷ tirukkāḷatti mahātevaṟkku nicatam Uḻakku neyyaṭṭak kaṭavomāy yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu ḷ 100 9 10 varaiyilum Aṭṭivan=tilāmaiyālum Inṉeyyālu n=tayirālum nāṅkaḷ Aṭṭakkaṭavomāṉa ney patiṉai(n)y kalamum tayir nāṟpattu nāṟkalane Irutūṇikkum Āka ceytu poṉ ṟu ney Irutūṇik kuṟuṇiyāka vatan poṉ Irupatiṉ kaḻañcum nellu nāḻikku tayir nāḻiyuriyākat tayir nāṟpattu nāṟ kalane Irutūṇiyāl van=ta nellu Irupattoṉpatiṉ kalane Irutūṇik kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyāl poṉ Oṉṟukku nellu Eḻukala vaṇṇamāka van=ta poṉ nāṟ kaḻañce Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyu miraṇṭu māvum Āka poṉ Irupattu nāṟ kaḻañce Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum Iraṇṭu māvum kaṭavomāy IppoṉThe inscription stops here unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 17.328 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
